arts.ttl: 'Many times' - Bruno Fernandes sends message to Andre Onana after Manchester United mistake
arts.sum: Andre Onana made a mistake that led to Viktoria Plzen scoring against Man Utd in the Europa League game, although Ruben Amorim's side came back to win 2-1.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim admits frustration with some Manchester United players as he praises three substitutes
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund came on to score twice for Man United as they beat Viktoria Plzen in the Europa League ahead of Sunday's Manchester derby.

arts.ttl: Højlund double seals comeback win for Manchester United over Viktoria Plzen
arts.sum: Rasmus Højlund’s double secured Manchester United a much-needed 2-1 comeback victory in the Europa League at Viktoria Plzen as Ruben Amorim registered his first away win as head coach. After making a promising start to life as Erik ten Hag’s successor, things were thrown off track as the shock exit of sporting director Dan Ashworth compounded back-to-back defeats to Arsenal and Nottingham Forest. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Luke Littler pleads for former Man United star to return to the club in now-deleted Instagram post after Red Devils man's error in Europa League win over Viktoria Plzen
arts.sum: United left it late in their Europa League clash on Thursday night, but a Rasmus Hojlund double salvaged a point for the side as they picked up their first European away win since March last year.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy's heartwarming comment as Man Utd icon pays tribute to Sir Bobby Robson
arts.sum: Leicester manager Ruud van Nistelrooy played under Sir Bobby Robson at PSV Eindhoven and he has paid tribute to the Newcastle legend ahead of his side's clash with the Magpies

arts.ttl: Man Utd fire subtle Arsenal dig with statement ahead of FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Manchester United put out a statement explaining why they had not put tickets on sale for their FA Cup clash at Arsenal pointing the finger at the Gunners for their failure to provide more information

arts.ttl: Gyokeres HUGE twist, Man Utd pick Garnacho over Rashford, Spurs eye Arsenal star's brother: FT Recap
arts.sum: Gyokeres HUGE twist, Man Utd pick Garnacho over Rashford, Spurs eye Arsenal star's brother: FT Recap The European matchweeks continued as teams prepare for the upcoming January transfer window ahead of a busy festive period.

However, amid the transition, Marcus Rashford’s role at Old Trafford has become a contentious topic.
